handoff_reason_note: Initial scaffolding of the sprint. Schema, workflow, helper, tests, and docs all landed in one PR; this file is parked as the seed handoff for the next iteration of the routine.
checkpoint_summary: Sprint S-061 introduces a bounded session-handoff routine. With this PR landed, the repo has a JSON schema, a live next_session.json, an example handoff, a continue-work GitHub Actions workflow, a helper script Claude can run at session end, validation tests, and operator docs. The routine is sprint-bounded by design.
completed_items: Added automation/session_handoff/ tree (schema, example, README, this live file)

next_actions.title: Exercise the routine end-to-end on the next real long sprint
next_actions.detail: Use this scaffolding for the first sprint that legitimately needs cross-session continuation. Tune handoff_reason values and the continuation_prompt template based on what worked.

guardrails: Do not modify code under src/runtime/ or src/units/ in this sprint.
Do not change live-trading flags, strategy parameters, or account modes.
Do not introduce a database — repo files are the source of truth.
Do not extend this routine into perpetual self-directed planning. It is sprint-bounded.
continuation_prompt: You are resuming sprint S-061-session-handoff on branch claude/session-handoff-workflow-00IP8. Read automation/session_handoff/next_session.json first; it lists completed_items, next_actions, files_to_review, and guardrails. Pick up the first entry of next_actions and stop at the next safe checkpoint. Do not start a new sprint.

history.note: Seed handoff written as part of the S-061 implementation PR.
